title: Integration Notifications
excerpt:

posts.author: ekhoury (Elie Khoury)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

While setting up Integrations to notify our teams via Outlook and MS Teams, the pop-up view to compose the message is very small compared to the rest of the integration overlay, and there is no way to make that bigger to be able to compose the message and see all the board items.

Is there a way to allow us to resize that message compose view to be able to see more of the message and board items?

Screenshot showing Microsoft Teams integration with the Notify compose view visible1920×1050 68.5 KB

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ekhoury !

To my knowledge, this is as big as the pop up window gets.

Of course you can scroll to see more of the message and all of the board values/columns.

I have also upvoted this, it’s a good idea to make the pop up window bigger .

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
